evidence_sources.self_assessment: Client self-reported skills and experience levels

skills.evidence_detail: Test responses show workable Windows troubleshooting baseline with missing depth on advanced flows
skills.notes: Confirmed as usable baseline; still needs deeper structured flow practice

skills.evidence_detail: Test shows AD lockout/reset concept and basic account actions, but exact enterprise steps remain incomplete
skills.notes: Keep as probable until exact step sequence and permission boundaries are validated

skills.evidence_detail: Test includes Outlook-related incident handling but does not demonstrate modern-auth/WAM-depth troubleshooting
skills.notes: Keep as probable; modern-auth loop resolution remains a gap area
Previously assessed in different project context

skills.evidence_detail: Ticket T6 response shows partial checks only; missing full no-internal-access diagnostic flow
skills.notes: Tested and below expected L1 troubleshooting standard for connected-but-unusable VPN scenarios

skills.evidence_detail: CV and LinkedIn profile history repeatedly reference RDP/remote support tools in active support work
skills.notes: CV-backed capability; not directly validated in the 2026-01-30 test

skills.evidence_detail: Rapid-fire answers show unresolved TCP vs UDP and share/NTFS fundamentals despite basic DNS/DHCP understanding
skills.notes: Tested and below hiring-safe baseline for core TCP/IP practical explanation

skills.evidence_detail: Rapid-fire R5 answer was 'I don't know' for TCP vs UDP practical distinction
skills.notes: Explicit networking gap requiring immediate interview-readiness remediation

skills.evidence_detail: Ticket responses contain useful intent but inconsistent employer-format structure and escalation criteria
skills.notes: Tested and below target for production-ready L1 ticket documentation quality

skills.evidence_detail: Client communicates fluently in English throughout project

confidence_levels.confirmed: Verified by hands-on test, certification, or direct evidence
confidence_levels.probable: Likely based on self-report or indirect evidence; needs verification
confidence_levels.gap: Tested and found insufficient; improvement plan needed
